news.headline: Hong Kong’s CUHK aims to bring AI to life with humanoid-focused robotics lab
news.summary:
The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) has opened the city’s first full-stack interactive robotics lab, partnering with 24 tech firms, mostly from mainland China, to train talent and develop humanoid robots over the next five years.

news.headline: Mali drone strikes kill at least 10 civilians at wedding
news.summary: Mali's military carries out strikes after attacks last month by al-Qaeda-linked fighters and Tuareg separatists.
